title: Defense stocks jump as U.S., Iran exchange attacks
summary_full: The defense sector was a rare bright spot amid a broader market sell-off triggered by fears of a wider regional conflict following U.S. attacks on Iran.
summary_public: The defense sector was a rare bright spot amid a broader market sell-off triggered by fears of a wider regional conflict following U.S. attacks on Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S., Iran exchange attacks... fears of a wider regional conflict
